query:
-- Check all anuncios with their dates
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.cliente,
  a.fecha_inicio,
  a.fecha_fin,
  a.estado,
  a.notas,
  p.cobertizo_id
FROM anuncios a
LEFT JOIN paradas p ON a.parada_id = p.id
ORDER BY a.fecha_inicio;

-- Count by month
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(fecha_inicio, '%Y-%m') as mes,
  COUNT(*) as cantidad
FROM anuncios
GROUP BY mes
ORDER BY mes;

FROM anuncios a
